findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: This is the body's honest accounting of what the week will cost.
The alarm fires early because the cost is real and the body has learned not to be surprised by it.
